meta.description: Market-price rate sensitivity interpretation using stored daily close history, SPY benchmark returns, and FRED Treasury rate observations.

rateUpRelativeReturn1Y.label: 1Y Rate-Up Return vs SPY
rateUpRelativeReturn1Y.description: Cumulative stock daily log return minus SPY daily log return on days when the 10-year Treasury yield rises over the last trading year. Negative values mean the stock underperformed SPY on rate-up days.

rateUpRelativeReturn3Y.label: 3Y Rate-Up Return vs SPY
rateUpRelativeReturn3Y.description: Cumulative stock daily log return minus SPY daily log return on days when the 10-year Treasury yield rises over the last three trading years. Negative values indicate repeated market underperformance during rising-rate days.

rateShockRelativeReturn1Y.label: 1Y Rate-Shock Return vs SPY
rateShockRelativeReturn1Y.description: Cumulative stock daily log return minus SPY daily log return on days when the 10-year Treasury yield rises by at least 5 basis points over the last trading year. Negative values suggest vulnerability to sharper rate-up moves.

rateBeta3Y.label: 3Y Rate Beta
rateBeta3Y.description: Regression beta of daily stock log returns against daily 10-year Treasury yield changes over the last three trading years. Negative values mean the stock has tended to fall when rates rise.

curveFlatteningRelativeReturn3Y.label: 3Y Curve-Flattening Return vs SPY
curveFlatteningRelativeReturn3Y.description: Cumulative stock daily log return minus SPY daily log return on days when the 10-year minus 2-year Treasury spread falls over the last three trading years. Negative values suggest weakness during curve-flattening days.
